1_Linux_and_Shell: Essential Commands: ls, cd, cp, mv, rm, mkdir, chmod, chown
File Viewing: cat, less, head, tail, grep, awk, sed
Process Management: ps, top, htop, kill, nice
Networking Commands: ping, curl, wget, netstat, ss, nmap
SSH: Key-based Authentication, Config File, Tunneling
Shell Scripting: Variables, Loops, Conditionals, Functions
2_Git_and_Version_Control: Git Internals: Objects (blob, tree, commit, tag), Refs
Git Workflow: init, clone, add, commit, push, pull, fetch
Branching: branch, checkout, switch, merge, rebase
Git Rebase: Interactive Rebase, Squashing Commits
GitHub Flow vs GitFlow vs Trunk-based Development
Pull Requests and Code Review Best Practices
3_Docker: Dockerfile: FROM, RUN, COPY, ADD, ENV, EXPOSE, CMD, ENTRYPOINT
Docker Build: Layers, Caching, Multi-stage Builds
Docker Images: pull, push, tag, inspect
Docker Containers: run, start, stop, exec, logs, rm
Docker Volumes: Named, Bind Mounts, tmpfs
Docker Compose: services, volumes, networks, depends_on
Docker Security: Non-root User, Read-only Filesystem
Docker Registry: Docker Hub, ECR, GCR
4_Kubernetes: Kubernetes Architecture: Control Plane, Worker Nodes
Pods: Lifecycle, Multi-container Pods, Init Containers
Persistent Volumes and Persistent Volume Claims
5_CI_CD: CI/CD Concepts: Continuous Integration, Delivery, Deployment
GitHub Actions: Workflows, Jobs, Steps, Actions
GitHub Actions: Secrets, Environments, Matrix Builds
6_Monitoring_and_Observability: The Three Pillars: Metrics, Logs, Traces
Jaeger and Zipkin for Distributed Tracing

1_AWS_Core: AWS Global Infrastructure: Regions, AZs, Edge Locations
EC2: Instance Types, AMIs, Security Groups, Key Pairs
VPC: Subnets, Route Tables, Internet Gateway, NAT Gateway
S3: Buckets, Objects, Versioning, Lifecycle Policies
2_AWS_Databases: DynamoDB: NoSQL Key-Value and Document Store
DynamoDB: Partition Key, Sort Key, GSI, LSI
3_AWS_Serverless: API Gateway: REST and HTTP APIs
